sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('SELECT MAX([', coalesce(item().WatermarkColName, 'MODIFIED_TS'), ']) AS NewWatermark FROM ', item().SrcSchemaName, '.', item().SrcTableName)

source.sqlReaderQuery:
select TABLE_NAME,TABLE_SCHEMA
  from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
  WHERE  TABLE_NAME like '%raw%'
